raw_consumer_statement:
I booked what was described as an All Inclusive vacation for myself, my partner, and my parents. I did not receive what I paid for : instead I wasted a large amount of money of flights ; a large amount of time traveling, and then was out into a dangerous and painful situation- as was my mother and father. I diluted the charges with American Express as I did not receive the service I purchased. I provided evidence, I attempted to contact the merchant first, and my dispute was denied by American Express because the merchant offered me 6 % of the total in rewards points. I would never spend another XXXX with them so that was a useless offer. 


American Express refuses to submit the dispute as service not received and instead had it as a dissatisfaction dispute. Their agents have wasted an incredible amount of my time and provided very very poor service. Yet again- American Express is shirking their federally mandated responsibility to do any investigation let alone a thorough one. Merely to help Unique Vacations ( current owner of Sandals ) steal from me. 

i have attached photos of things that were part of the service i paid for that were falsehoods. Such as butler service, butler preferences, mini bar restock, XXXX  XXXX  ( as a XXXX XXXX  I can promise that they are not at all XXXX  XXXX  ), restaurants that were not open to XXXX when they should have been, etc.
